themes.headline: QAAUM crossed ₹9 trillion; equity-oriented AUM > ₹6 trillion (65.5% mix)
themes.detail: Industry AUM at ₹80.2T. Over the last 2 calendar years, net new flows have exceeded ₹10 trillion (~$115B).

themes.headline: Unique investor penetration now at 26%; added 2.8M of industry's 6.4M
Systematic transactions reached ₹47.3 bn in Dec '25 — 24% YoY growth
themes.detail: SIP asset base now ₹16.6T, > 20% of industry AUM.

themes.headline: PMS AUM crossed ₹50 bn; secured a couple of large mandates
themes.detail: Alternatives: completed first close of private credit fund.

themes.headline: Gold & silver ETFs are now 18% of industry ETF AUM
themes.detail: ₹327 bn of net new flows into gold/silver ETFs in the quarter alone.

events.label: Two large PMS mandates secured during the quarter
Private credit AIF — first close completed

quotes.text: Net new flows over the past 2 calendar years have exceeded ₹10 trillion or approximately USD 115 billion.
quotes.speaker: Simal Kanuga, CIRO
